title: I want to be able to remove dropdown options from a Form but keep the on the board's historical submissions
excerpt: To be able to keep selections in a dropdown current, I would like the ability to remove them from the form but still keep them on the board.  Currently, to be able to remove an option from the dropdown on the form, I nee…

posts.author: rbrodhagen (Richard Brodhagen)
posts.cookedHtml: To be able to keep selections in a dropdown current, I would like the ability to remove them from the form but still keep them on the board. Currently, to be able to remove an option from the dropdown on the form, I need to remove any instance of that selection on the board.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @rbrodhagen,

How about duplicating the column and then deleting the options that you don’t need?

posts.author: rbrodhagen (Richard Brodhagen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Alfred,

Thanks for the help.

I was able to resolve the issue with a workaround. I created a duplicate board to upload the excel file, corrected any column types necessary and then moved the items from the duplicate board onto the original board.

We can close this issue.
